name: editorial-review-and-edit
label: Editorial Review and Edit
description: A full editorial polish pass over a drafted manuscript, ported from the n8n Neptune editorial suite. Runs the four classic edit passes in order, each per-chapter (analyze → apply): developmental edit (structure/pacing/character/theme), then line edit (prose/flow/show-don't-tell/banned words), then copy edit (grammar/punctuation/consistency), then proofread (surface errors only). Run AFTER production. Two related editorial pipelines were imported alongside this suite but are NOT auto-chained here: editorial-alpha-read (applies supplied alpha-reader feedback) and editorial-outline-council (a multi-model OUTLINE improvement pass, planning-stage) — add either to this sequence if you want them in the chain.
